\h 28 Enhancement Revision History Changed By Date Version Notes: Brianne Williams 4/27/202 2 0.0 Original Document Brianne Williams 5/08/2022 0.1 Assumption changes, Verified By Column replaced BOL Code, added BOL Quantity in Verify Shipment-Verify Shipment. Brianne Williams 6/02/2022 0.2 Took out Print Shipment Variance Report and View Shipment Variance Report Brianne Williams 6/ 09/2022 0.3 Change d ITEM_CBO.COMMERCE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE 1 /2 to ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1/2 to account for negati ve numbers Brianne Williams 7/13/2022 0.4 Added BOL/Trailer/ S eal Validations Brianne Williams 7/27/2022 0.4 Update LPN_DETAIL.EXPIRATION to LPN .EXPIRATION_DATE Brianne Williams 02/22/2023 0.4 Added ASN Hyperlink and Shipped Qty and Variance Mapping changes EX26B – Receiving Q&A Enhancements McLane captures host required information from users during Inbound Shipment Receiving such as pallet counts, temperatures, and trailer details . Certain items require temperature capture during receiving. Temperature capture items need to be in their set range to ensure that nothing is spoiled. The temperature capture requirements change based on the number of items on the shipment. McLane uses shipment level receiving to receive all ASNs on a shipment and verify all ASNs on a shipment at once. Summary Information Customer Name: McLane Customer Code: MCLN Subproject Codes: TBD Change Request Number: Overview Functional Area Enhanced Additional Information User Interface (UI) Y Question Answer Determination Rules MHE N RF Y RF Receiving, Question Answer Reporting N Other N WMOS enhances base Question Answer Determination Rules to dictate how many item level temperature questions to prompt the user. Base shipment level receiving prompts for item level questions every time that item is scanned. Item level questions are altered so that users are only prompted for them during the first item scanned for that shipment. WMOS prompts for 3 questions if there is only one item on the shipment and prompts for 1 question per item if there are more than 1 item on a shipment. If a temperature scanned in those prompts are out of the item’s temperature range, then a warning message is displayed, and the user is directed to enter in 6 more temperatures for the item. WMOS is also enhanced to provide a custom Verify Shipment UI to verify all ASNs on a shipment at once. This UI also show the questions answer history of each Shipment. Users are displayed warnings for mandatory questions that were not answered, temperature ranges that are , and expired LPNs that were received. The verify ASN button in this UI work s like the verify ASN button in the ASNs UI for EX26A , in that it prompt s for unanswered mandatory questions that were skipped . We add a new column ITEM_NAME to QUESTION_ANS , that capture s the item that was scanned for the item level questions. We also add the temperature value fields that are being used to store an items max and min temperature to the QUESTION_ANS table. WM give s a warning message when users select verify ASN and any iLPNs on the shipment are expired. The Verify Shipment UI link s to the iLPNs UI. There is a hyperlink on the received iLPNs columns. Once the user selects this hyperlink, they are only be displayed the iLPNs that correspond to that ASN/Shipment. Assumptions This extension is only used for receiving RF Receiving Item-Level. Shipments with 1 item prompt s for 3 temperature question Shipments with more than 1 item prompt s for 1 temperature question per item Maximum of 6 item level questions per question answer determination rule Q&A can be re-prompted at any point after initial base capture and before ASN verification ASN verification can be completed in the ASN UI or the new Verify Shipment UI At the time of ASN /Shipment verification, the receiving Clerk manually key s in answers in the Web UI if not all questions were answered during receiving EX26B is only valid for Shipment receiving RF Receiving is set to prompt Shipment (Parameter 3-3 = Yes) RF Receiving is set to receive in iLPN mode (parm 1-1 = ‘ iLPN ’) Check for Q&A is enabled (Parameter 27-27 = Yes) EX26B Question Answer is not supported for Fixed Station Receiving All ASNs are linked together on a Shipment using the Shipment Interface All mandatory questions will be answered in the RF during receiving or by a supervisor at the time of ASN verification No two users will leverage custom CTRL Q option at the same time If two users leverage CTRL Q option at the same time, WM should display error message “Q&A process already in progress” The process to have any other user o ther than the initial user answer questions should be handled by SOP since WM will automatically prompt for the questions only to the initial user receiving the shipment Cannot CTRL-Q from the 6 additional temperature questions CTRL-Q for Item level questions show after the Item prompt CTRL-Q will only show the questions for the item that the user is currently receiving Items that require temperat ure questions will have ITEM_CBO.COMMERCE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE 1 set to 1 ASNs with no shipment will be verified through base ASN verification All fields are filterable and sortable BOL ,Seal,Trailer are configured using base custom attributes. Dependencies Code Dependencies EX26A Receiving Q&A Enhancements Interface Dependencies Interface Field Requirement ITEM ITEM à Miscellaneous Instructions à Code 1 Min Temperature ITEM ITEM à Miscellaneous Instructions à Code 2 Max Temperature Platform Information Solution: Solution Platform: Solution Version: Warehouse Management Open Systems Oracle/ Tomcat /RHEL 201 9 Process Flow Diagram Process Steps User enters the Verify Shipment UI User can filter in the UI by shipment and ASN. User performs the following actions: Verify ASNs Click on an iLPN hyper link that displays all the iLPNs on that ASN View the Question Answer history for the shipment selected Process Steps User launches RF Receiving transaction to begin receiving RF displays the Dock Door prompt, and users enter the Dock Door RF displays the Shipment prompt and users enters the shipment. Base validates if shipment level Q&A are setup If it’s the first user receiving the shipment, proceed to step 5. If it’s not the first user receiving, proceed to step 8 If Shipment is Perishable, WMOS prompts for Question Answer capture for Shipment Level Perishable questions before proceeding to LPN Prompt. If a user takes exception CTRL key during the question prompts, WM will exit the questions and proceed to the LPN prompt and continue receiving until unless the user takes the exception CTRL key again to re-prompt the questions. If Shipment is Dry, WMOS prompts for Question Answer capture for Shipment Level Dry questions before proceeding to LPN Prompt If a user takes exception CTRL key during the question prompts, WM will exit the questions and proceed to the LPN prompt and continue receiving until unless the user takes the exception CTRL key again to re-prompt the questions. If Shipment is mixed of both Dry and Perishable, WMOS prompts for Question Answer capture for Shipment Level for both Dry and Perishable questions before proceeding to LPN Prompt If a user takes exception CTRL key during the question prompts, WM will exit the questions and proceed to the LPN prompt and continue receiving until unless the user takes the exception CTRL key again to re-prompt the questions. WMOS prompts user for LPN capture. If user takes exception CTRL key to prompt Question Answer, WMOS will prompt from the last unanswered question. If all questions are answered and user presses the exception CTRL key, WM will re-prompt the questions with the answers already displayed and the ability to edit from the first question. Otherwise, user scans LPN. WMOS prompts user for item barcode If user takes exception CTRL key to prompt Question Answer, WMOS will prompt from the last unanswered question. If all questions are answered and user presses the exception CTRL key, WM will re-prompt the questions with the answers already displayed and the ability to edit from the first question. Otherwise, user scans item barcode. If a temperature required item has been scanned before or a non-temperature required item has been scanned proceed to step 14. If this is the first time the item has been scanned for the shipment proceed to step 11. If there is only 1 item on the shipment, WMOS prompts for 3 item level temperature questions If user scans a temperature that is not in the range ( stored in ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR where ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1 and ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 2 ) then Display custom warning TASKMGMT 26 00 Warning “ Temperature(s) are out of range” and proceed to step 13. If a user takes exception CTRL key during the question prompts, WM will exit the questions and proceed to the next base receiving prompt to continue receiving until unless the user takes the exception CTRL key again to re-prompt the questions. If there are more than 1 item on the shipment, WMOS prompts for 1 item level temperature question. If user scans a temperature that is not in the range ( ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR where ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1 and ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 2 ) then Display custom warning TASKMGMT 26 00 Warning “ Temperature(s) are out of range” and proceed to step 13. If a user takes exception CTRL key during the question prompts, WM exits the questions and proceed to the next base receiving prompt to continue receiving until unless the user takes the exception CTRL key again to re-prompt the questions. If the user gets the warning message “ Temperature(s) are out of range” the user can CTRL-W to go to the previous temperature prompt(s). If the user CTRL-A to accept the warning they will be directed 6 additional item level temperature questions. WMOS continues with base RF Receiving screen flow **At any point in the receiving transaction, any user can execute the custom CTRL key to have WM re-prompt the questions or exit the questions and continue receiving** UI Verify Shipment UI The Verify Shipment UI is used by associates to help verify all ASNs on a shipment. In addition to shipment verification, the Verify Shipment UI is used to track inventory in that is expired or have out of range dates. Screen 2 Verify Shipment - Verify Shipment Verify Shipment- Verify ASN UI displays if the verify shipment button is clicked on in the Verify Shipment UI. This UI allows the user to verify all the ASNs on a shipment at once. Display This UI is repurposed from the base ASNs – Verify ASN UI for the verification purposes. # Literal Source Display Length (R/L justified) 1 Shipment SHIPMENT .TC_SHIPMENT_ID 15A(L) 2 Item Select a.ITEM_NAME from LPN_DETAIL a inner join LPN b on a.LPN_ID = b.LPN_ID where tc_Shipment_ID = ' Shipment '; 9N(L) 3 LPN Select a. TC _LPN_ID from LPN_DETAIL a inner join LPN b on a.LPN_ID = b.LPN_ID where tc_Shipment_ID = ' Shipment '; 20N(L) 4 ASN select TC_ASN_ID from ASN where TC_SHIPMENT_ID = ' Shipment '; 8A(L) 5 BOL Q uantity ASN.EXT_PLAN_ID 5N(L) User Actions Verify Shipment Verify Shipment Validations: Perform validations that there are not LPNs that are expired on the ASNs that are on the shipment. If there are any iLPNs that have an LPN.EXPIRATION _DATE less than today’s date , then display TASKMGMT 26 0 1 error “LPN {0} is expired”. If there are any temperatures that were captured during receiving that are out of the defined temperature ranges set in ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR and ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR display TASKMGMT 26 0 2 error “LPN {0} temperatures out of range ”. WM checks to see if there are unanswered mandatory questions, by validating if there are missing questions (QUESTION_ANS.QUES_MASTER_ID) for the shipment. Questions are defined for each filter in the Question Answer Determination Rules UI (QUESTION_DETRM). If there are questions (QUESTION_DETRM.QUES_MASTER_ID) that are missing for the shipment in QUESTION_ANS.QUES_MASTER_ID throw error “Unanswered Mandatory QV Questions exist for the ASN, cannot Verify” and display those missing questions as unanswered mandatory questions. Perform validations that all ASNs have a value for BOL, Seal, and Trailer. Select attribute_value from asn_attribute where asn_id = 'ASNs ASN_ID' and attribute_name = 'BOL' and attribute_name = 'Seal' and attribute_name = 'Trailer' ; Display TASKMGMT 26 0 3 “ BOL, Seal, or Trailer are missing! ” Updates : All ASNs for a shipment changed to ASN Verified status Screen 3 – Verify Shipment – iLPN Verify Shipment – iLPNs UI displays if the iLPN hyper link is clicked on in the Verify Shipment UI. This UI allows the user to view the iLPNs that attached to the ASN that was selected. Display This UI is repurposed from the base iLPNs UI. left top User Actions Base iLPNs Actions. Screen 4 Verify Shipment – Question Answer History The Verify Shipment – Question answer History UI displays if the Question Answer History button is clicked on in the Verify Shipment UI. This UI displays the history of the answers for this shipment. Display This UI is repurposed from the base Question Answer History UI. Exit the questions 2. Prompt for the unanswered questions at any point during receiving 3. Re-prompt already answered questions to make edits to the responses Program Platform Available Text Based (RF Gun) Y UI N Mobile (DM) N RF Receiving – Questions Display ASN prompt enabled per base configuration. Ctrl Keys No changes to base control keys as part of this extension. EX26A CTRL-Q can be used to re-prompt item level questions. Ctrl Key MSG # Ctrl Key Text Action Ctrl-Q CTRLKEY Q&A Exit Q&A or prompt/re-prompt unanswered questions Note – Existing base ctrl-keys remain Validations Question Prompts Validation If there is only 1 item on the shipment WMOS prompts custom Item Level questions configured for business activity ‘Receive Dynamic Item Level Questions 1 (S-930 Code ID = WM_ITEMQV_EX26b1). WM prompts 3 questions from ‘ Receive Dynamic Item Level Questions 1 ’ . The 3 questions are con figured in the Question Answer D etermination Rules UI under B usiness A ctivity Receive 1 Item . If there are more than one item, WM prompts for 1 question per item on the shipment from ‘Receive Dynamic Item Level Questions 2 (S-930 Code ID = WM_ITEMQV_EX26b2) The 1 question is configured in the Question Answer Determination Rules UI under Business Activity Receive Multi Item. If the temperature scanned is out of range. User gets a custom warning message that temperature is out of range after the temperature prompt. WM calculates temperatures out of range by using the stored maximum and minimum temperature values stored on ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR where ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1 and ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR where ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 2 User prompted with an additional 6 temperature questions (S-930 Code ID = WM_ITEMQV_EX26b3). The 6 questions are configured in the Question Answer Determination Rules UI under Business Activity Receive Out of Range. Updates If a non-temperature required item has been scanned or a temperature required item has answers ( WMOS checks the Q UESTION _ANS table to see if there is a n existing record for the shipment and item to check that an item on the shipment already has temperature answers ) Then proceed to base receiving flow Else If this is the first time the item has been scanned and there is only 1 item on the shipment, WMOS prompts for 3 item level temperature questions . WMO S update s the answers from Question Answer History (QUESTION_ANS.ANS_TEXT) for the shipment. WMOS will also store the item that was scanned and that items temperature ranges in the Question Answer History . If this is the first time the item has been scanned for the shipment and there are more than 1 item on the shipment, WMOS prompts for 1 item level temperature question. WMOS should update the answers from Question Answer History (QUESTION_ANS.ANS_TEXT) for the shipment. WMOS will also store the item that was scanned and that items temperature ranges in Question Answer History table ’s new columns ( QUESTION_ANS.ITEM , QUESTION_ANS. MIN_TEMP, and QUESTION_ANS.MAX_TEMP ) . Then WMOS continues with base RF Receiving screen flow Else If user scan ned a temperature that is not in the range ( stored in ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR where ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1 and ITEM_MISC_INSTR.MISC_INSTR where ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 2 ) T hen Display custom warning TASKMGMT 26 00 Warning “Temperature(s) are out of range” at the last temperature question. Brianne Williams 6/02/2022 0.2 Took out Print Shipment Variance Report and View Shipment Variance Report Brianne Williams 6/ 09/2022 0.3 Change d ITEM_CBO.COMMERCE_NUM_ATTRIBUTE 1 /2 to ITEM_MISC_INSTR.INSTR_TYPE = 1/2 to account for negati ve numbers Brianne Williams 7/13/2022 0.4 Added BOL/Trailer/ S eal Validations Brianne Williams 7/27/2022 0.4 Update LPN_DETAIL.EXPIRATION to LPN .EXPIRATION_DATE Brianne Williams 02/22/2023 0.4 Added ASN Hyperlink and Shipped Qty and Variance Mapping changes EX26B – Receiving Q&A Enhancements McLane captures host required information from users during Inbound Shipment Receiving such as pallet counts, temperatures, and trailer details . Certain items require temperature capture during receiving. Temperature capture items need to be in their set range to ensure that nothing is spoiled. The temperature capture requirements change based on the number of items on the shipment. McLane uses shipment level receiving to receive all ASNs on a shipment and verify all ASNs on a shipment at once. Summary Information Customer Name: McLane Customer Code: MCLN Subproject Codes: TBD Change Request Number: Overview Functional Area Enhanced Additional Information User Interface (UI) Y Question Answer Determination Rules MHE N RF Y RF Receiving, Question Answer Reporting N Other N WMOS enhances base Question Answer Determination Rules to dictate how many item level temperature questions to prompt the user. Base shipment level receiving prompts for item level questions every time that item is scanned. Item level questions are altered so that users are only prompted for them during the first item scanned for that shipment. WMOS prompts for 3 questions if there is only one item on the shipment and prompts for 1 question per item if there are more than 1 item on a shipment. If a temperature scanned in those prompts are out of the item’s temperature range, then a warning message is displayed, and the user is directed to enter in 6 more temperatures for the item. WMOS is also enhanced to provide a custom Verify Shipment UI to verify all ASNs on a shipment at once. This UI also show the questions answer history of each Shipment.
